productDisplayName: Puma Men's Polo Neck Black T-shirt
description: CompositionBlack polo neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with ribbed collar,  buttoned placket,  tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, contoured panels on the back, red piping details on the back, embroidered logo on the right sleeve, brand name on the centre back, red, white and green piping on the right shoulder and with Scudera ferrari badge on the upper left chest FittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach Do not tumble dry at low Warm iron Do not dryclean Wash and iron inside out Wash with similar colours Use detergent for colours Take sporty dressing to the next level with this Scudera Ferrari polo neck t-shirt from puma. The black colour and the Ferrari badge on the left chest infuses this tee with power. The cotton fabric wicks away sweat and keeps you fresh and comfortable all day.Team this with jeans or chinos and lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model StatisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
